001package edu.cnm.deepdive.pippiphooray.controller;
002
003import android.os.Bundle;
004import android.view.LayoutInflater;
005import android.view.View;
006import android.view.ViewGroup;
007import androidx.annotation.NonNull;
008import androidx.annotation.Nullable;
009import androidx.fragment.app.Fragment;
010import androidx.lifecycle.ViewModelProvider;
011import androidx.navigation.Navigation;
012import dagger.hilt.android.AndroidEntryPoint;
013import edu.cnm.deepdive.pippiphooray.R;
014import edu.cnm.deepdive.pippiphooray.databinding.FragmentSignInBinding;
015import edu.cnm.deepdive.pippiphooray.viewmodel.SignInViewModel;
016
017@AndroidEntryPoint
018public class SignInFragment extends Fragment {
019
020  private FragmentSignInBinding binding;
021  private SignInViewModel signInViewModel;
022
023  @Nullable
024  @Override
025  public View onCreateView(
026      @NonNull LayoutInflater inflater,
027      @Nullable ViewGroup container,
028      @Nullable Bundle savedInstanceState
029  ) {
030    binding = FragmentSignInBinding.inflate(inflater, container, false);
031    binding.signInButton.setOnClickListener(
032        (v) -> {
033          binding.signInButton.setEnabled(false);
034          signInViewModel.signIn(requireActivity());
035        });
036    return binding.getRoot();
037  }
038
039  @Override
040  public void onViewCreated(@NonNull View view, @Nullable Bundle savedInstanceState) {
041    super.onViewCreated(view, savedInstanceState);
042    signInViewModel = new ViewModelProvider(requireActivity())
043        .get(SignInViewModel.class);
044
045    signInViewModel
046        .getCredential()
047        .observe(getViewLifecycleOwner(), (credential) -> {
048          if (credential != null) {
049            Navigation.findNavController(binding.getRoot())
050                .navigate(R.id.navigate_to_batch_list_fragment);
051          } else {
052            binding.signInButton.setEnabled(true);
053          }
054        });
055
056    signInViewModel
057        .getThrowable()
058        .observe(getViewLifecycleOwner(), (throwable) -> {
059          if (throwable != null) {
060            binding.signInButton.setEnabled(true);
061            binding.signInButton.setVisibility(View.VISIBLE);
062            // TODO: show a Snackbar or error text here.
063          }
064        });
065
066    // Attempt silent sign-in similar to capstone's signInQuickly.
067    signInViewModel.signInQuickly(requireActivity());
068  }
069
070  @Override
071  public void onDestroyView() {
072    binding = null;
073    super.onDestroyView();
074  }
075
076}
